title: Prananadeswarar Temple
tagline: Prananadeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Prananadeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirumangalakudi in Thanjavur District of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Prananadeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirumangalakudi in Thanjavur District of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Prananatheswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mangala Nayagi. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil poet saints known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. There are many inscriptions associated with the temple indicating contributions from Cholas, Thanjavur Nayaks and Thanjavur Maratha kingdom.

topPlaces.name: Thirumangalakudi
topPlaces.description: Thirumangalakudi is a village near Aduthurai in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. Prananadeswarar Temple, a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, is located here.

topPlaces.name: Suryanar Kovil
topPlaces.description: Suryanar Kovil (also called Suryanar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Hindu Sun-God, Surya, located in the village of Suryanar Koil, nearby Aduthurai, Thanjavur District in Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Suriyanar, the Sun and his consorts Ushadevi and Pratyusha Devi.

topPlaces.name: Maruthuvakudi
topPlaces.description: Maruthuvakudi, also known as Aduthurai is a small panchayat town situated near Kumbakonam, on the way to Mayiladuthurai, located in the Thanjavur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the sub urban region of business city of Kumbakonam.

topPlaces.name: Vannakkudi
topPlaces.description: Vannakkudi is a village in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, in India.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvisanallur Sivayoginathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sivayoginathar Temple also known as Yoganandeswarar temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in is located in Thiruvisanallur in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as purathaneshwarar in krutha yuga,yoganandheeswarar in threytha yuga,vilvaaranyeshwarar in dhwabara yuga and Sivayoganathar in kali yuga, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as soundhara nayaki or shantha Nayagi.

topPlaces.name: Mahalingeswarar Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur
topPlaces.description: Mahalingeswaraswamy Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tiruvidaimaruthur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is significant to the Hindu sect of Saivism as one of the seven major Shiva temples.

topPlaces.name: Veppathur
topPlaces.description: Veppathur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Veppathur was originally known as Nimmapuram (meaning "Neem Village" in Sanskrit).

topPlaces.name: Tiruneelakkudi Neelakandeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruneelakkudi Neelakandeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of Tiruneelakkudi is Thennalakudi .

items.note: Thirumangalakudi is a village near Aduthurai in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. Prananadeswarar Temple, a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, is located here.

Suryanar Kovil (also called Suryanar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Hindu Sun-God, Surya, located in the village of Suryanar Koil, nearby Aduthurai, Thanjavur District in Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Suriyanar, the Sun and his consorts Ushadevi and Pratyusha Devi.

Maruthuvakudi, also known as Aduthurai is a small panchayat town situated near Kumbakonam, on the way to Mayiladuthurai, located in the Thanjavur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the sub urban region of business city of Kumbakonam.
Vannakkudi is a village in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, in India.

Sivayoginathar Temple also known as Yoganandeswarar temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in is located in Thiruvisanallur in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as purathaneshwarar in krutha yuga,yoganandheeswarar in threytha yuga,vilvaaranyeshwarar in dhwabara yuga and Sivayoganathar in kali yuga, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as soundhara nayaki or shantha Nayagi.

Mahalingeswaraswamy Temple, Thiruvidaimarudur is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tiruvidaimaruthur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is significant to the Hindu sect of Saivism as one of the seven major Shiva temples.
Veppathur is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Veppathur was originally known as Nimmapuram (meaning "Neem Village" in Sanskrit).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Prananadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Prananadeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Prananadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Prananadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Prananadeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Prananadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Prananadeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Prananadeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thirumangalakudi, Suryanar Kovil, Maruthuvakudi, Vannakkudi, Thiruvisanallur Sivayoginathar Temple.
